verse_text: So he came by the Spirit into the temple. And when the parents brought in the Child Jesus, to do for Him according to the custom of the law,

links.context: Many in Zion awaited the Messiah, glory instead of ashes. One thinks of the aged Simeon ([[LUK.2:22]]-35), who was "waiting for the Consolation of Israel," and the prophetess Anna ([[LUK.2:36]]-38), "who looked for redemption in Jerusalem."

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
